title: Ketoni AFS FY2024 Year-End - First Full-Year Financial Statements
description: Ketoni Investment Holdings (Pty) Ltd financial year ends 29 February 2024. Annual Financial Statements independently reviewed (not audited) by Forvis Mazars. This is the first full-year AFS since incorporation on 2023-02-20, representing approximately 12 months of operations. Confirms Ketoni as operationally active during Mar 2023 - Feb 2024 with sufficient activity to warrant formal financial statements and Companies Act compliance.
evidence: Ketoni Investment Holdings AFS 2024 - Signed.pdf (16 pages)
significance: Confirms Ketoni as active entity; basis for assessing R18.75M payout capacity; ~790 days before May 2026 payout
